## Scope Confirmation

- [ ] This change implements only the referenced ticket.
- [ ] No product features outside the referenced ticket were added.
- [ ] No authentication, database models, payments, logistics, AI, blockchain,

## Due-Diligence Notes

- [ ] Ownership, transferability, or account-control implications were updated
      where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private keys were committed.
- [ ] New placeholders are clearly marked where values are unknown.
- [ ] Vendor names or assumptions were not added unless already approved by the
      ticket.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests run, or not required because this change has no executable behavior.
